status.description: The current status of the service.

compute_pool.description: Specifies the name of the compute pool in your account on which to run the service.

external_access_integrations.description: Specifies the names of the external access integrations that allow your service to access external sites.

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the service.

is_async_job.description: True if the service is an async job service; false otherwise.
